title: Rosa Runner Adventure
subtitle: Infinity loop 2D game
description: Game made during the master's degree in videogame development and design at EVAD. The game was made in 2D using unity as graphic engine and C# as programming language.

title: Tank Zombie Survivor
subtitle: 3D Wave round game
description: Game made during the master's degree in videogame development and design at EVAD. The game was made in 3D using unity as graphic engine and C# as programming language.

title: Global Game Jam 2023
subtitle: Game made for a Game Jam at EVAD
description: Game made for an EVAD Game Jam with the theme: roots. The game was made in 2D using unity as graphic engine and C# as programming language.

title: Realms Untold
subtitle: 3D Turn-based RPG game
description: Game made as a final project for EVAD's master's degree in development and design. The game was made in 3D using unity as graphic engine and C# as programming language.

title: Chi Design System
subtitle: https://lib.lumen.com/chi/latest
description: Design system for building digital products and experiences. This library supports Stencil-based web components and Vue components.
